title: Agentic source pairing and insight packet pilot
description: Run Codex pairing/extraction/review agents on the Dragon-first source set. Pair podcast sources to YouTube URLs via evidence packets and create initial insight/relation packets only from BP-explicit source spans.
acceptance_criteria: Pairing packets are reviewed, 20-50 draft/reviewed Dragon / Chaos Waters packets exist, theological/source-fidelity review decisions are recorded, and only approved packets are promoted.

title: Dragon-first Whisper transcription batch
description: Transcribe the Dragon-first podcast source set before full-corpus processing. Coordinate GPU availability by pausing Honcho GPU work if needed, and use small/mid Whisper models with safe parallelism for throughput.
acceptance_criteria: SRT/JSON transcripts exist for selected Dragon sources, timestamps are usable for source spans, model/parallelism settings are documented, and Honcho/GPU contention is avoided.

title: Dragon-first source selection and media ingest
description: Identify 5-15 BibleProject sources most applicable to the Dragon / Chaos Waters thin slice, then download only those podcast audio/source pages first under /home/yeshu/media/bibleproject-reader so agents can begin source pairing and packet creation.
acceptance_criteria: Candidate source list is agent-reviewed, Dragon-relevant audio/pages are stored under the approved media root, no YouTube videos are downloaded, and source records exist for each selected item.

title: Phase 1: BSB reader substrate and mechanical validators
description: Build the first static PWA reader substrate around public-domain BSB data, translation abstraction, offline cache shape, and mechanical JSON/data validators. Do not ingest BibleProject insights yet.
acceptance_criteria: BSB source is documented, text normalized by book/chapter/verse, app can consume reader data offline, validators cover schema/anchors/timestamps mechanically, and no raw media enters git.
notes: Building tested deployable MVP: static offline PWA reader, seed passage/insight data, validators, test suite, and Netlify deployment.
close_reason: MVP shipped: BSB reader substrate, validators, tests, Netlify production deploy, and GitHub Actions deploy gate verified.

title: Phase 0 scaffold: repo, source policy, schemas, and agentic workflow docs
close_reason: Phase 0 scaffold passed spec and quality review

title: Full BP podcast corpus download and transcription backlog
description: After Dragon-first downloads are running and agents have begun packet creation, start downloading and transcribing the remaining BibleProject podcast corpus for later processing.
acceptance_criteria: Rest-of-corpus download/transcription process runs after the Dragon-first batch has started, respects media root layout, avoids YouTube video downloads/rate limits, and documents GPU/Whisper concurrency choices.
